description_long: This is a stylized humanoid doll with a youthful appearance, featuring a short, flared red dress with puffed sleeves and a black underskirt. The doll has pale skin, long white hair styled into two large, high pigtails with pointed tips, and a pair of small, pointed horns on its head. Its arms are adorned with matching red cuffs, and it wears black high-heeled shoes. A long, thin, purple tail with a spade-shaped tip extends from the lower back, adding a fantasy or demonic element. The facial features are delicate and doll-like, with large eyes and a small mouth, and the overall design is reminiscent of anime or video game characters.
description: A stylized humanoid doll in a red dress with white pigtails, horns, and a purple tail, featuring black high heels and fantasy-inspired details.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the red dress, the full length of the white pigtails, and the purple tail extending downward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the pointed horn, the layered dress, and the high-heeled shoe.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the doll's facial features, the front of the red dress, the white pigtails, and the black shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the other profile, the right horn, the arm cuff, and the tail curving outward.
attribute_clothing_style: Short, flared red dress with puffed sleeves and black underskirt, matching red wrist cuffs, and black high-heeled shoes; the style is reminiscent of fantasy or anime-inspired fashion with playful and demonic elements.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms extended outward horizontally, legs straight and close together, head facing forward, and torso erect; the pose is static and symmetrical.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral facial expression with relaxed mouth, wide open eyes, and slightly arched eyebrows, conveying a calm and composed demeanor.
attribute_hair_style: Long, thick white hair styled into two high, voluminous pigtails with pointed ends and straight texture.
